title: Device Home Screen - Charge Case battery charging icon
scenario: Charge case battery icon fails to show/remove charging sign when charger is plugged/unplugged on Device Home Screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your phone.
3. Open the charge case with earbuds inside (no charger plugged in).
4. Observe the battery icon for the charge case on the Home screen.
5. Plug a charger into the charge case.
6. Observe the battery icon for the charge case on the Home screen.
7. Unplug the charger from the charge case.
8. Observe the battery icon for the charge case on the Home screen.
expected: Step 4: The charge case battery icon shows no charging sign. Step 6: The charge case battery icon displays a charging sign. Step 8: The charging sign disappears from the charge case battery icon.
